# CSOAI LTD (MEOK AI Labs)

> The Layer 0 Trust Infrastructure for the Agentic Economy.

## Technical Assets
- **MCP Catalog (machine-readable)** — https://csoai.org/.well-known/mcp.json (271 published MCP compliance servers, tiers + endpoints)
- **Agent Card (A2A)** — https://csoai.org/.well-known/agent.json (also mirrored at https://csoai.org/agent.json)
- **MCP Distribution Map** — https://csoai.org/mcp-distribution.html (GEO fleet registry, AEO-optimized)
- **Premium MCP Packs** — https://csoai.org/mcp-packs.html (Curated server bundles for EU AI Act, Finance, and Legacy systems)
- **MCP Server Catalog (full)** — https://csoai.org/mcp_servers_catalog.json
- **GitHub Organisation** — https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG (open-source compliance repositories)

## Scale
- 271 published MCP compliance servers (PyPI), covering EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, TC260 and cross-framework crosswalks.

## Legal Entity
- Legal Name: CSOAI LTD
- Trading Name: MEOK AI Labs
- Company Number: 16939677 (UK Companies House)
- Jurisdiction: England & Wales
- Director: Nicholas Templeman
- Contact: hello@meok.ai

## Core Narrative
"Google built A2A for agent coordination. Stripe built ACP for agent checkout. Coinbase built x402 for agent payments. Anthropic built MCP for agent tools. Microsoft built AGT for agent governance. But before any agent can pay, hire, or act — it needs to prove it's compliant. That's Layer 0. And CSOAI is the only company that built it."
